steps.title: Determine Capacitance Needed
steps.description: Calculate from circuit requirements (timing, filtering, or energy storage).

steps.title: Select Voltage Rating
steps.description: Choose at least 2× the maximum circuit voltage for reliability.

steps.title: Choose Dielectric Type
steps.description: Ceramic for general/high-freq, film for stability, electrolytic for bulk capacitance.

steps.title: Consider Tolerance
steps.description: Precision circuits need ±1% to ±5%; general purpose can use ±20%.

steps.title: Check ESR and Temperature
steps.description: Low ESR for switching power supplies; stable temp coefficient for precision.

tips: Never exceed voltage rating — failure can be explosive
Use polarized capacitors with correct orientation
For audio, use film capacitors for best sound quality
